title: CapabilityToken

tokenId.description: Opaque token identifier (used as reference in RunRecord.tokenRef).

subject.description: The subject to whom this token was issued.

scope.description: Datasets, field paths, asset IDs, and operations permitted by this token.

purpose.description: Declared purpose for which the token was issued (e.g., 'export', 'analysis').

decisionRef.description: URN of the PolicyDecision that authorised token issuance.

obligations.description: Obligations the holder must fulfil when exercising this token.

iat.description: Issued-at time as a Unix epoch integer.

exp.description: Expiry time as a Unix epoch integer.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over the token contents.

description: A short-lived, signed access token issued after a successful PolicyDecision, granting a specific subject permission to perform scoped operations on one or more datasets or assets, and carrying any associated obligations.
